name: claude-deck-chat-pane
title: Claude Deck Chat Pane
description: Deck-specific lean chat-pane reconstruction derived from the Claude chat-pane shell and Sonnet 4.6 launch-frame rhythm. Claude plus PowerPoint/deck scenes that need only the active topbar, deck-focused message field, and composer without sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Codex, or desktop chrome.
